channel.title: Creature Feature
channel.description: Updates for The Creature Feature Website

item.title: Creature of the Month: Jack Skelington in Christmas Mode
item.description: This is like the second Nightmare Before Christmas Character this year, ah well, what do you expect from something that is both a Halloween and a Christmas Movie

item.title: Journal Entry: Merry Christmas And a Happy New
item.description: How I spent my Christmas

item.title: Journal Entry: Reflectin on 2024
item.description: In which i reflect what heck happened in this last year

item.title: Creature of The Month: The Amazing Flying Snake
item.description: Seeing as this is the year of the snake, this month is dedicated to one of the most fascinating reptiles on the palnet

item.title: Creature of The Month: Kieran Valentine from Monster High
item.description: For the Month of Love I chose this Vampire for the lulz

item.title: Site Update: About Page
item.description: Removed the icons for the Neil Gaiman and Sandman Fanlists on the About page. I almost forgot they were still there.

item.title: Journal Entry: Fish Keeping February And Monthly Recap
item.description: I´ve Been Struggle to keep my Pet Fish Alive, also Here´What I´ve been Up too this month

item.title: Creature of The Month: The Gopher From CaddyShack
item.description: Decided to Dedicate The Incoming Month of Spring to this Chaotic little Fella, who has been many a ruin of Golf´s Courses

item.title: Dream Journal: Earworm Musick
item.description: My Dreams sometimes come with their Own Playlist I swear

item.title: Creature of The Month: Wallace as a Wererabbit
item.description: Easter has arrived, time for some rabbits! Were Rabbits that is

item.title: Journal Entry: Country Blackout
item.description: Woke up yesterday, day started like anyother. Then Bam no power, no internet. Here´s how I managed to cope

item.title: Creature of The Month: The Sarlac
item.description: this being pratically star wars month, here´s an interesting video about one of the most horrific predator in that universe

item.title: Creature of The Month: The Seagull
item.description: This time of year Seagulls are Born, I dedicate this Month for them

item.title: Creature of The Month: The SummerWeen Trickster
item.description: This update is later than usual, but I dedidacte this month summerween

item.title: Creature of The Month: TheSeptember Skeleton
item.description: Do you remember? The 21st Night of Septmeber

item.title: Creature of The Month: Jack Skellington
item.description: You got the September Skelleton now get ready for Jack Skellington the King of Halloween!

item.title: Journal Entry: Enjoying the Movie sinners and other October Stuff
item.description: Finally Cave in And Watched Sinners and here´s what I´ve been up to this month

item.title: Creature of The Month: Frankenstein
item.description: Guillermo Del Toro does it again with his new movie

item.title: Creature of The Month: Jim Carrey´s The Grinch
item.description: Merry Christmas, sorry for the late update. We dedicate this festive Month to my favorite version of the Grinch. Take it away, Jim!

item.title: Journal Entry: We´re now on the Year of the Horse
item.description: 2025 is now gone, now its time for my own annual year in review!

channel.item:
Site Update And Creature of the Month https://creaturefeature.neocities.org
This site now uses Deploy to Neocities. Now I dont have ot upload pages manually to the site editor Also spring is coming which means the arrivals of Swallows Wed, 25 mar 2026 17:43:00 +0100

item.title: Creature of the Month: Jax from The Amazing Digital Circus
item.description: April has Now starts with Easter and April Fool´s Day so i´m dedicating this Months to everyone´s favorite Bunny Trickster Thur, 2 apr 2026 17:01:00 +0100
